title: Bullet
description: Represents a reusable resume bullet tied to a specific experience entry.

experience_id.description: ID of the experience entry this bullet belongs to.

bullet_text.description: The full text of the resume bullet.

category.description: Classification of the bullet for filtering and assembly.

skill_tags.description: Skill IDs or names associated with this bullet.

quantification_flag.description: Indicates whether the bullet contains quantifiable metrics.

cross_cutting_links.description: Links to cross-cutting themes (leadership, governance, etc.).

relevance_score.description: Dynamically computed score used by the tailoring engine.

rewrite_variants.description: Alternate phrasings of the bullet for tone/length variations.

length.description: Primary length classification of the bullet.
